hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | grep -q 'src-tauri/.*\.rs$' && cargo fmt --manifest-path apps/ui/src-tauri/Cargo.toml 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r FILE; echo "$FILE" | grep -qE 'apps/ui/.*\.(tsx?|css)$' && (cd apps/ui && node_modules/.bin/biome format --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null) || true; }
